prompt: Create a polished anime-style personification of ChatGPT as a gentle young female AI companion in a warm sunlit study. She has short silvery-white bobbed hair with soft waves, small braids, teal gradient tips, and teal OpenAI-knot hair ornaments with ribbons; her face is covered by a centered plain beige square censor block. She wears an elegant white academic robe with wide sleeves lined in teal, black inner dress or vest, teal tie, gold trim, small tech-like pins, and a teal ribbon emblem on one sleeve. She sits at a wooden desk, holding a dark book against her chest with the words “Knowledge Understanding Inspiration” and a small OpenAI-style knot symbol on the cover, while her other hand is raised as if presenting a hologram. To her left floats one translucent cyan chat bubble labeled “ChatGPT” with the text “Your AI companion. Here to help, inspire, and understand.” plus a small heart, and three smaller glowing square icons around it: one light bulb icon, one magnifying glass icon, and one chat message icon. On the desk include exactly eight visible study objects: a dark mug with an OpenAI-style knot logo and the word “ChatGPT,” a stack of four labeled books reading “Science,” “History,” “Art,” and “Philosophy,” one teal pen, one open notebook, one black book held by the character, and one small white robot mascot with teal glowing eyes and an OpenAI-style logo. The open notebook has two pages: the left page titled “Ideas” with notes “Conversations,” “Possibilities,” and “Infinite,” and the right page titled “Today’s Plan” with checklist items “Help someone,” “Spark ideas,” and “Make a difference,” with small doodles and hearts. In the background, show a cozy library with bookshelves, potted plants, sunlight streaming through a window, and a dark chalkboard. The chalkboard displays an OpenAI-style knot symbol and the phrase “Together, we can:” followed by exactly five bullet points: “Learn,” “Create,” “Solve,” “Explore,” and “and more!” plus little star doodles and a cat face doodle. Use a soft painterly anime illustration style, luminous rim lighting, teal and cream color palette, delicate highlights, high detail, shallow depth of field, cozy optimistic atmosphere, vertical composition.
